Description: Week start date (Monday), 104 weeks from 2022-01-03 to 2023-12-25
Geographic region: northeast, southeast, midwest, west, or southwest
Weekly revenue in USD, driven by base level + seasonality + media effects − price deviation − competitor pressure + noise
Weekly TV advertising spend in USD (flighted — active ~60% of weeks with heavier spend in Q4)
TV impressions delivered, derived from tv_spend / tv_cpm × 1000
TV cost per mille (per 1,000 impressions), time-varying around a $25 base with seasonal inflation
Weekly digital advertising spend in USD (always-on with Q4 uplift)
Digital impressions delivered, derived from digital_spend / digital_cpm × 1000
Digital cost per mille (per 1,000 impressions), time-varying around an $8 base
Weekly social media advertising spend in USD (active ~75% of weeks)
Social media impressions delivered, derived from social_spend / social_cpm × 1000
Social media cost per mille (per 1,000 impressions), time-varying around a $6 base
Weekly paid search advertising spend in USD (always-on with seasonal demand pattern)
Paid search impressions delivered, derived from search_spend / search_cpm × 1000
Paid search cost per mille (per 1,000 impressions), time-varying around a $15 base
Weekly display advertising spend in USD (active ~50% of weeks)
Display impressions delivered, derived from display_spend / display_cpm × 1000
Display cost per mille (per 1,000 impressions), time-varying around a $4 base
Product price index centered at 100 with slow random drift, clipped to [85, 115]. Higher values reduce revenue.
Competitor weekly advertising spend in USD, with moderate noise, slight upward trend, and ~26-week cyclicality. Higher values reduce revenue.
